title: भैरव हृदयम्
devanagariText:
॥ श्री भैरव हृदयम् ॥

ॐ अस्य श्रीभैरवहृदयस्तोत्रमन्त्रस्य।
शिव ऋषिः। अनुष्टुप् छन्दः।
श्रीभैरवो देवता। भैरवप्रीत्यर्थे जपे विनियोगः॥

कालभैरवं महादेवं ज्वालामालापरिष्कृतम्।
कपालमालाभरणं भस्मभूषितविग्रहम्॥ १॥

डमरुत्रिशूलधारिणं श्वानवाहनसंस्थितम्।
कोटिसूर्यप्रतीकाशं भैरवं हृदयं भजे॥ २॥

भैरवस्य हृदं दिव्यं सर्वभूतभयापहम्।
सर्वव्याधिविनाशाय सर्वदुःखनिवारणम्॥ ३॥

क्षेत्रपालं नमस्यामि काशीपुरनिवासिनम्।
नगररक्षकं देवं ग्रामपालं सुरेश्वरम्॥ ४॥

अष्टभैरवमध्यस्थं रुरुभैरवसंयुतम्।
चण्डभैरवसंसेव्यं कपालभैरवं प्रभुम्॥ ५॥

योगिनीगणसंसेव्यं डाकिनीमण्डलेश्वरम्।
कालरात्रिसमारूढं कालदण्डधरं हरम्॥ ६॥

सर्वपापहरं देवं सर्वमङ्गलकारणम्।
भैरवस्य हृदं स्तोत्रं यः पठेत् भक्तिसंयुतः॥ ७॥

सर्वभयविनिर्मुक्तो जायते विजयी सदा।
रोगशोकविनिर्मुक्तो भैरवस्य कृपां लभेत्॥ ८॥

॥ इति श्री भैरव हृदयम् सम्पूर्णम् ॥
transliteration:
|| Shri Bhairava Hridayam ||

Om Asya Shri Bhairava Hridaya Stotra Mantrasya |
Shiva Rishih | Anushtup Chhandah |
Shri Bhairavo Devata | Bhairavaprityarthe Jape Viniyogah ||

Kalabhairavam Mahadevam Jvalamalaparishkritam |
Kapalamalabharanam Bhasmabhushitavigraham || 1 ||

Damarutrishuladharinam Shvanavahanasamshitam |
Kotisuryapratikasham Bhairavam Hridayam Bhaje || 2 ||

Bhairavasya Hridam Divyam Sarvabhutabhayapaham |
Sarvavyadhinashaya Sarvaduhkhanivaranam || 3 ||

Kshetrapalam Namasyami Kashipuranivasinam |
Nagarakshakam Devam Gramapalam Sureshvaram || 4 ||

Ashtabhairavamadhyastham Rurubhairavasanyutam |
Chandabhairavasamsevyam Kapalabhairavam Prabhum || 5 ||

Yoginiganasamseevyam Dakinimandaleshvaram |
Kalaratrisamarudham Kaladandadharam Haram || 6 ||

Sarvapapaharam Devam Sarvamangalakaranam |
Bhairavasya Hridam Stotram Yah Pathet Bhaktisanyutah || 7 ||

Sarvabhayavinirmukto Jayate Vijayi Sada |
Rogashoka Vinirmukto Bhairavasya Kripam Labhet || 8 ||

|| Iti Shri Bhairava Hridayam Sampurnam ||
hindiMeaning:
ज्वालामाला से परिष्कृत, कपालमालाभरण, भस्मभूषित, डमरु-त्रिशूलधारी, श्वानवाहन कालभैरव के हृदय का ध्यान करें।

भैरव का हृदय स्तोत्र सर्वभूतभय हरने वाला, सर्वव्याधि नाशक, सर्वदुःख निवारक है।

क्षेत्रपाल, काशीनिवासी, नगररक्षक, अष्टभैरवों के मध्य विराजमान।

इसे भक्ति से पढ़ने वाला सर्वभय मुक्त, विजयी, रोग-शोक मुक्त हो भैरव कृपा पाता है।
benefits: Heart hymn of Lord Bhairava for supreme protection
Removes all fears, diseases, and sorrows
Invokes Bhairava as Kshetrapala for place protection
Grants victory and freedom from all afflictions
Powerful for Kala Bhairava Ashtami and Saturday worship
description: Among the most cherished prayers to Lord Bhairava, Bhairava Hridayam (भैरव हृदयम्) stands as a heart-essence prayer. Drawn from Rudra Yamala Tantra, this text has been cherished by devotees for centuries. Regular recitation is believed to remove all fears, diseases, and sorrows, grant victory and freedom from all afflictions, and heart hymn of Lord Bhairava for supreme protection. This prayer is traditionally recited on Saturday (Shanivar) and Tuesday (Mangalvar) and during Kala Bhairava Ashtami to invoke divine grace. Comprising 8 verses, it can be completed in approximately 4 minutes, making it suitable for daily devotional practice. On this page, you can read the complete Bhairava Hridayam in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Read Bhairava Hridayam in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Heart hymn of Lord Bhairava for protection, fear removal, and victory.
